name: Suggest meeting slots using AI
description: Fetches recent Gmail messages to find meeting requests, checks Google Calendar availability for the next few days, uses Claude AI to identify meeting requests and suggest available time slots, then sends a reply via Gmail with proposed meeting times.

lookbackHours.description: How many hours back to scan for meeting requests

workingHoursStart.description: Start of working hours (24h format, e.g. 9)

workingHoursEnd.description: End of working hours (24h format, e.g. 17)

senderName.description: Name to sign the reply email with

steps.name: Calculate date ranges for email search and calendar
Fetch full email content for each message
Extract email content from API responses
Fetch calendar events for the next 5 days
Build Claude prompt for meeting analysis
Prepare reply data for meeting requests
Send reply emails for meeting requests
